text: ® £ CloudFormation Signal @ rostsemcanons, (@ s ¢ Configure CloudFormation to hold (more on this soon..) ¢ Wait for ‘X’ number of success signals e Wait for Timeout H:M:S for those signals (12 hour max) ¢ If success signals received .. CREATE_COMPLETE ¢ If failure signal received .. creation fails e If timeout is reached .. creation fails » .. CreationPolicy or WaitCondition
